title: Hadron Spectroscopy with Lattice QCD
chosen_convention: Use a Euclidean two-point correlator with interpolating operators chosen to overlap the target pion channel at zero momentum.
why_needed: PyQUDA examples and tests show the implementation pattern, but this review provides the lattice-spectroscopy framing for the correlator and operator-selection convention.

title: The sigma meson from lattice QCD with two-pion interpolating operators
chosen_convention: Use the narrow wall-source zero-momentum convention and record that the p=0 truncation corresponds to wall sources.
why_needed: PyQUDA local references encode wall inversions and zero-momentum contractions but do not explain the physics-side meaning of the wall-source p=0 choice.
